title: Create Character
resetConfirmMessage: This will replace this character's overrides with the values set in Settings > Defaults. This cannot be undone.
displayNamePlaceholder: Shown instead of Name in the interface (optional)
displayNameDesc: If set, this name is used in character cards, thread cards, and chat headers. Prompts still use the Name field.
catboxNoService: Configure a Catbox account in Cloud Services first
catboxSizeLimit: Image exceeds Catbox's {{limit}} MB limit for {{type}} files
taglinePlaceholder: A short tagline for your character…
promptPlaceholder: Describe the character's behavior, personality, and setting…
personalityPlaceholder: Describe the character's core personality, traits, and quirks…
globalContextPlaceholder: Describe the overarching world, setting, or scenario the character exists in…
systemPromptPlaceholder: Optional system-level instructions appended to every API request (except summarization)…
extraPromptPlaceholder: Additional instructions that will only be sent once…
postHistoryInstructionsPlaceholder: Additional instructions that will be sent after last message…
personaSubtitle: Manage your personas — who you are in the story.
personaDescriptionPlaceholder: A short bio for this persona…
personaContextPlaceholder: Describe your persona's background, personality, and traits. This will be used as context in chats…
noPersonas: No personas yet. Create one to define how you appear in chats.
confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this persona?
autoTitleSystemInstructionsPlaceholder: Instructions for the system on auto-titling…
autoTitleUserInstructionsPlaceholder: Instructions for the user on auto-titling…
messagesToKeepDesc: How many of the most recent messages that were part of the last summarization request in a chat will still be passed to the API requests of a chat until the next summarization event.
memorySlotsDesc: How many memory entries (slots) the chat will have per memory level.
confirmDeleteInitialMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this initial message?
noInitialMessages: No initial messages yet. Add one to greet the user when a new chat starts.
exampleMessagePlaceholder: Write an example of how the character should respond…
confirmDeleteExampleMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this example message?
noExampleMessages: No example messages yet. Add one to instruct the model on how to respond.
scenarioPlaceholder: Write a scenario to set the stage for the conversation…
confirmDeleteScenario: Are you sure you want to delete this scenario?
noScenarios: No scenarios yet. Add one to set the stage for a conversation.
confirmLifetime: This Lifetime option will be applied to all existing scenarios. Continue?
promptUserDesc: Ask which scenario to use when starting a new chat
directorAutoTitleInstructionsPlaceholder: Instructions for the director reviewing auto-title responses…
directorSummarizationInstructionsPlaceho: Instructions for the director reviewing summarization responses…
directorRegularChatInstructions: USER Director Instructions for Regular Chat
directorRegularChatInstructionsPlacehold: Instructions for the director reviewing regular chat responses…
directorRegularChatSystemInstructions: SYSTEM Director Instructions for Regular Chat
directorRegularChatSystemInstructionsPla: System prompt for the director reviewing regular chat responses…
directorOOCInstructionsPlaceholder: Instructions for the director reviewing OOC responses…
directorLiteralSystem: System message from the API call
directorLiteralUser: User message from the API call
tagsSectionPlaceholder: Type a tag name or paste comma-separated tags…
